zh.lifeSummary: 當Santa Isabel de Aragão於1271年1月4日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩時，她的父親Rey Pedro III de Aragón30歲，母親Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón23歲。她和Dinis I de Portugal至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1336年6月4日在葡萄牙埃沃拉艾斯特雷莫享年65歲，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉桑塔 克拉拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Santa Isabel de Aragão于1271年1月4日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩时，她的父亲Rey Pedro III de Aragón30岁，母亲Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón23岁。她和Dinis I de Portugal至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1336年6月4日在葡萄牙埃沃拉艾斯特雷莫享年65岁，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉桑塔 克拉拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Santa Isabel de Aragão was born on 4 January 1271, in Zaragoza, Aragón, Spain, her father, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, was 30 and her mother, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Dinis I de Portugal. She died on 4 June 1336, in Estremoz, Évora, Portugal, at the age of 65, and was buried in Santa Clara, Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Santa Isabel de Aragão est née le 4 janvier 1271, à Zaragoza, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Dinis I de Portugal. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1336, à Estremoz, Évora, Portugal, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Santa Clara, Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Santa Isabel de Aragão am 4. Januar 1271 in Zaragoza, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Pedro III de Aragón 30 und ihre Mutter Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón 23. Sie hatte mit Dinis I de Portugal mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1336 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Estremoz, Évora, Portugal und wurde in Santa Clara, Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Santa Isabel de Aragão è nata il il 4 gennaio 1271 nel Zaragoza, Aragón, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Dinis I de Portugal. Morì il 4 giugno 1336, nel Estremoz, Évora, Portogallo, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Santa Clara, Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Santa Isabel de Aragãoが1271年1月4日にスペインアラグoンザラゴザで生まれた時，父Rey Pedro III de Aragónは30歳，母Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragónは23歳であった。彼女はDinis I de Portugalとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1336年6月4日にポルトガルeボラエストレモズで65歳で死去し，ポルトガルコインブラコインブラサンタ クラーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Santa Isabel de Aragão(이)가 1271년 1월 4일 스페인 아라그o 자라고자에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Pedro III de Aragón(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Dinis I de Portugal(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 6월 4일 포르투갈 e보라 에스트렘즈에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라 산타 클라라에 묻혔다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Santa Isabel de Aragão nasceu em 4 de janeiro de 1271, em Zaragoza, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Dinis I de Portugal. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1336, em Estremoz, Évora, Portugal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Santa Clara, Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Santa Isabel de Aragão родилась 4 января 1271 г. в местности зарагоза, арагoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Pedro III de Aragón было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Dinis I de Portugal. Она умерла 4 июня 1336 г. в местности эстремоз, eвора, Португалия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности санта клара, коимбра, коимбра, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Santa Isabel de Aragão nació el 4 de enero de 1271, en Zaragoza, Aragón, España, su papá, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Dinis I de Portugal. Murió el 4 de junio de 1336, en Estremoz, Évora, Portugal, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Santa Clara, Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal.
